name: olympian-archive
description: Build script for The Archivist — reads wiki markdown and generates data.js

scripts.watch: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');let t=0;fs.watch('../../Titus Jr\'s Workspace/wiki',{recursive:true},(e,f)=>{if(Date.now()-t>1000){t=Date.now();console.log('Wiki changed, rebuilding...');try{execSync('node build.js',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.error(e.message)}}});"
